subcategory: ""
description: |-
  Manages a Zabbix trigger action (event_source = 0).

---

# zabbix_action_trigger (Resource)

Manages a Zabbix trigger action (`event_source = 0`).

Trigger actions fire when a trigger changes state (problem/recovery/update). The `event_source` discriminator is hardcoded to `0` — see [ADR-0015](../docs/adr/0015-action-trigger-as-typed-resource.md).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Minimal trigger action — notify Zabbix administrators on any high-severity event.
resource "zabbix_action_trigger" "notify_admins" {
  name              = "Notify administrators"
  escalation_period = "1h"

  filter {
    evaluation_type = "and_or"

    condition {
      condition_type = "trigger_severity"
      operator       = "greater_or_equals"
      value          = "3"
    }
  }

  operations {
    escalation_step_from = 1
    escalation_step_to   = 1
    escalation_period    = "0"

    send_message {
      use_default_message = true
      user_group_ids      = ["7"]
    }
  }

  recovery_operations {
    notify_all_involved = true
  }
}

# Trigger action with custom per-operation subject/message.
resource "zabbix_action_trigger" "custom_message" {
  name              = "Custom message action"
  escalation_period = "30m"

  filter {
    evaluation_type = "and_or"

    condition {
      condition_type = "trigger_severity"
      operator       = "greater_or_equals"
      value          = "4"
    }

    condition {
      condition_type = "maintenance_status"
      operator       = "not_in"
      value          = "1"
    }
  }

  operations {
    escalation_step_from = 1
    escalation_step_to   = 3

    send_message {
      use_default_message = false
      subject             = "ALERT: {EVENT.NAME}"
      message             = "Affected host: {HOST.NAME}"
      user_group_ids      = ["7"]
    }
  }

  recovery_operations {
    send_message {
      use_default_message = false
      subject             = "RESOLVED: {EVENT.NAME}"
      message             = "Problem resolved on {HOST.NAME}"
      user_group_ids      = ["7"]
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Display name of the trigger action. Must be unique within Zabbix.

### Optional

- `escalation_period` (String) Default escalation period. Accepts time suffixes (`"1h"`) and macros (`"{$ESC_PERIOD}"`). Defaults to `"1h"`.
- `filter` (Block, Optional) Conditions that must be matched for the action to fire. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter))
- `notify_if_canceled` (Boolean) Send recovery notifications for problems canceled during maintenance. Defaults to `true`.
- `operations` (Block List) Escalation operation steps. Each step runs `send_message` or `remote_command`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--operations))
- `pause_suppressed` (Boolean) Pause operations while hosts are in a maintenance period. Defaults to `true`.
- `recovery_operations` (Block List) Operations executed when the triggering problem is resolved. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--recovery_operations))
- `status` (String) Whether the action is active. One of: `enabled`, `disabled`. Defaults to `enabled`.
- `update_operations` (Block List) Operations executed when the triggering problem is updated (acknowledged). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--update_operations))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the trigger action.

<a id="nestedblock--filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter`

Required:

- `evaluation_type` (String) How conditions are evaluated. One of: `and_or`, `and`, `or`, `custom_expression`.

Optional:

- `condition` (Block List) Filter conditions. At least one condition is required. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filter--condition))
- `formula` (String) Custom expression joining condition labels (e.g. `"{A} and ({B} or {C})"`). Required when `evaluation_type = "custom_expression"`, must be absent otherwise.

<a id="nestedblock--filter--condition"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter.condition`

Required:

- `condition_type` (String) Type of condition. One of: `host_group`, `host`, `trigger`, `trigger_name`, `trigger_severity`, `time_period`, `host_ip`, `maintenance_status`, `event_tag`, `event_tag_value`.
- `operator` (String) Comparison operator. One of: `equals`, `not_equals`, `like`, `not_like`, `in`, `greater_or_equals`, `less_or_equals`, `not_in`.
- `value` (String) Value to compare against.

Optional:

- `label` (String) Single-letter label referenced in `formula` (e.g. `"A"`). Required when `evaluation_type = "custom_expression"`, must be absent otherwise.
- `value2` (String) Secondary comparison value (used by some condition types).



<a id="nestedblock--operations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `operations`

Optional:

- `escalation_period` (String) Escalation period for this step. `"0"` inherits the action's `escalation_period`. Accepts time suffixes (`"1h"`) and macros.
- `escalation_step_from` (Number) First escalation step this operation applies to. Defaults to `1`.
- `escalation_step_to` (Number) Last escalation step this operation applies to. `0` means all steps from `escalation_step_from` onwards. Defaults to `1`.
- `remote_command` (Block, Optional) Execute a remote command. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--operations--remote_command))
- `send_message` (Block, Optional) Send a notification message. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--operations--send_message))

<a id="nestedblock--operations--remote_command"></a>
### Nested Schema for `operations.remote_command`

Optional:

- `current_host` (Boolean) Run the command on the host that triggered the event. Defaults to `false`.
- `custom_script` (Block, Optional) Execute a custom script. Exactly one of `custom_script`, `ipmi`, `ssh`, `telnet`, `global_script` must be set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--operations--remote_command--custom_script))
- `global_script` (Block, Optional) Run a Zabbix global script. Exactly one of `custom_script`, `ipmi`, `ssh`, `telnet`, `global_script` must be set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--operations--remote_command--global_script))
- `host_group_ids` (Set of String) Set of host group IDs to run the command on.
- `host_ids` (Set of String) Set of host IDs to run the command on.
- `ipmi` (Block, Optional) Execute an IPMI command. Exactly one of `custom_script`, `ipmi`, `ssh`, `telnet`, `global_script` must be set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--operations--remote_command--ipmi))
- `ssh` (Block, Optional) Execute a command over SSH. Exactly one of `custom_script`, `ipmi`, `ssh`, `telnet`, `global_script` must be set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--operations--remote_command--ssh))
- `telnet` (Block, Optional) Execute a command over Telnet. Exactly one of `custom_script`, `ipmi`, `ssh`, `telnet`, `global_script` must be set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--operations--remote_command--telnet))

<a id="nestedblock--operations--remote_command--custom_script"></a>
### Nested Schema for `operations.remote_command.custom_script`

Optional:

- `command` (String) Script body to execute.
- `execute_on` (String) Execution target. One of: `agent`, `server_or_proxy`, `server`.


<a id="nestedblock--operations--remote_command--global_script"></a>
### Nested Schema for `operations.remote_command.global_script`

Optional:

- `script_id` (String) ID of the Zabbix global script to run.


<a id="nestedblock--operations--remote_command--ipmi"></a>
### Nested Schema for `operations.remote_command.ipmi`

Optional:

- `command` (String) IPMI command to execute.


<a id="nestedblock--operations--remote_command--ssh"></a>
### Nested Schema for `operations.remote_command.ssh`

Optional:

- `authtype` (String) Authentication type. One of: `password`, `public_key`.
- `command` (String) Command to execute over SSH.
- `password` (String) SSH password (used when `authtype = "password"`).
- `port` (String) SSH port. Defaults to `""` (Zabbix uses 22).
- `private_key` (String) Private key for SSH authentication (used when `authtype = "public_key"`).
- `public_key` (String) Public key for SSH authentication (used when `authtype = "public_key"`).
- `username` (String) SSH username.


<a id="nestedblock--operations--remote_command--telnet"></a>
### Nested Schema for `operations.remote_command.telnet`

Optional:

- `command` (String) Command to execute over Telnet.
- `password` (String) Telnet password.
- `port` (String) Telnet port. Defaults to `""` (Zabbix uses 23).
- `username` (String) Telnet username.



<a id="nestedblock--operations--send_message"></a>
### Nested Schema for `operations.send_message`

Optional:

- `media_type_id` (String) ID of the media type to use. Defaults to `"0"` (all media types configured for the recipient).
- `message` (String) Custom message body. Required when `use_default_message = false`, must be absent when `true`.
- `subject` (String) Custom message subject. Required when `use_default_message = false`, must be absent when `true`.
- `use_default_message` (Boolean) When `true`, the media type's default subject/message are used; `subject` and `message` must be absent. When `false`, `subject` and `message` are required.
- `user_group_ids` (Set of String) Set of user group IDs to send the message to.
- `user_ids` (Set of String) Set of user IDs to send the message to.



<a id="nestedblock--recovery_operations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `recovery_operations`

Optional:

- `notify_all_involved` (Boolean) Notify all users who previously received problem notifications. Mutually exclusive with `send_message` and `remote_command`.
- `remote_command` (Block, Optional) Execute a remote command. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--recovery_operations--remote_command))
- `send_message` (Block, Optional) Send a notification message. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--recovery_operations--send_message))

<a id="nestedblock--recovery_operations--remote_command"></a>
### Nested Schema for `recovery_operations.remote_command`

Optional:

- `current_host` (Boolean) Run the command on the host that triggered the event. Defaults to `false`.
- `custom_script` (Block, Optional) Execute a custom script. Exactly one of `custom_script`, `ipmi`, `ssh`, `telnet`, `global_script` must be set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--recovery_operations--remote_command--custom_script))
- `global_script` (Block, Optional) Run a Zabbix global script. Exactly one of `custom_script`, `ipmi`, `ssh`, `telnet`, `global_script` must be set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--recovery_operations--remote_command--global_script))
- `host_group_ids` (Set of String) Set of host group IDs to run the command on.
- `host_ids` (Set of String) Set of host IDs to run the command on.
- `ipmi` (Block, Optional) Execute an IPMI command. Exactly one of `custom_script`, `ipmi`, `ssh`, `telnet`, `global_script` must be set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--recovery_operations--remote_command--ipmi))
- `ssh` (Block, Optional) Execute a command over SSH. Exactly one of `custom_script`, `ipmi`, `ssh`, `telnet`, `global_script` must be set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--recovery_operations--remote_command--ssh))
- `telnet` (Block, Optional) Execute a command over Telnet. Exactly one of `custom_script`, `ipmi`, `ssh`, `telnet`, `global_script` must be set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--recovery_operations--remote_command--telnet))

<a id="nestedblock--recovery_operations--remote_command--custom_script"></a>

Optional:

- `command` (String) Script body to execute.
- `execute_on` (String) Execution target. One of: `agent`, `server_or_proxy`, `server`.
